Description: Workflow DAG definitions and execution history
OAuth2/OIDC identity store and session state
Notes: SQLite file defaults to /app/data/auth.db but compose only mounts auth-data at /data - not actually covered by the volume - BackupFrequency/RetentionDays left blank since no effective backup runs until path/mount are aligned

Description: Encrypted secrets metadata - values remain encrypted at rest
Notes: Shamir unseal keys never stored alongside DB

Description: Audit and log metadata - not yet durably persisted
Notes: OBSERVATORY_DB_PATH is configured but the worker never opens or writes it - audit events currently live only in an in-process deque and are lost on restart - backup/retention are aspirational until this is implemented
